title: Topic, Headers, Alternate, and Exchange-to-Exchange Routing
description: Routing keys encode unstable JSON, topic wildcards overlap unexpectedly, headers matching trusts absent fields, and unroutable messages vanish because mandatory and alternate behavior are not designed together. Learners cumulatively produce multi-strategy routing and unroutable-message table through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Design bounded dot-separated topic taxonomies whose stable semantic segments support exact, star, and hash matching.
Enumerate overlapping topic bindings and prove which queues receive one copy even when multiple bindings on the same queue match.
Use headers exchanges only with typed bounded metadata and explicit all-versus-any matching, not as a schema-free routing escape hatch.
